summary: Decent audience recording captures a solid Scarlet > Fire performance amid generally mediocre electric sets, with the acoustic set standing out.
review: The show is highlighted by an inspiring Scarlet > Fire sequence that reviewers describe as tight and beautifully transitioned, while the acoustic set on the 11th is noted as the best part of the weekend. The audience recording is praised as “nice,” giving a clear sense of room ambience, though overall electric sets are considered mediocre.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are moderately positive about the Scarlet > Fire performance and acoustic set but note average electric material; recording quality is described as nice but not exceptional, leading to a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners mention a "nice aud" and ability to feel the room, indicating a decent audience capture with acceptable clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Acoustic set on the 11th is highlighted as the best, while electric sets are viewed as generally mediocre; transition into Fire is praised for its smoothness.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "snaking" his way into Fire, showcasing strong lead guitar work.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums are noted for guiding the transition into Fire.
